title: Spaarti cloning cylinder

{{Quote|...A small, almost trivial, piece of technology.|[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]|<ref name="HttE">''[[Heir to the Empire]]''</ref>}}
'''Spaarti cloning cylinders''' were four-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-tall tanks<ref name="DB Cloning" /> that acted as mechanical wombs filled with nutrient chemicals and organic catalyzers,<ref name="jvs">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref> used for the creation of personal [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] armies by those wealthy and/or well-connected enough to acquire them.

To create clones from Spaarti cylinders was the fastest known form of cloning. [[Kamino/Legends|Kaminoan]] cloning had a single clone grown safely at maturity in ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. With a Spaarti cloning cylinder, a fully-mature adult [[Human/Legends|Human]] could be grown in a staggeringly quick one standard year. However, Kaminoan cloning was much more effective, for ten years of growing in constant learning and training resulted in creating perfect warriors despite the long wait. Spaarti clones did not receive any training, instead they had their personalities formed by a process known as "[[Flash pumping|flash-pumping]]," which involved writing the memories of another person to a fresh clone's brain. Spaarti clones grown in less than a full year had the dangerous side effect of possible [[clone madness]]. However, [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] discovered that using [[Ysalamiri/Legends|ysalamiri]] to cut off the clone's connection to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] would enable the creation of the clone within 15 to 21 standard days.<ref name="DB Cloning" />

==History==
===Early history===
{{Quote|Beginning this evening, Spaarti Creations will be turning its complete facilities over to the manufacture of a new design of cloning tanks.|The contents of Kinman Doriana's card given to Lord Binalie|<ref name="HoC" />}}
They were built by [[Spaarti Creations]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]].<ref name="HoC" /> They seem to have their origins in both [[Khommite/Legends|Khommite]]<ref name="TFUCG">''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]''</ref> and [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] cloning technologies.<ref name="jvs" />

===Clone Wars===
{{Quote|You worry too much, Clonemaster. I only require your clones to be fit for purpose, and that means they have no need to meet the exacting standards as the army bred on Kamino. The Grand Army has to be the very best in the galaxy for one single special operation ahead of them. This is the culmination of my strategy—two armies with two quite separate tasks.|Chancellor Palpatine, to the Spaarti lead clonemaster supervising the production of a new clone army on Centax-2|<ref name="O66" />}}
Cloning cylinders were thought to have been destroyed during the [[Attack on Cartao|Battle of Cartao]], but a few thousand units survived.<ref name="Spaarti CWSE" /> The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] used [[Arkanian Microtechnologies]]' Spaarti clones to complement the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|clone army]].<ref name="O66" />

At the near end of the Clone Wars, all but a few were unaware that [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] had secretly commissioned a second clone army, which differed from the [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]-bred Fett clones in two primary ways: they were grown to maturity in roughly one year as opposed to ten years, and they were created on [[Centax-2/Legends|Centax-2]] instead of Kamino. [[Omega Squad]] noticed this, adding to their suspicions about Chancellor Palpatine's intentions. The clone troopers of the [[14th Infantry Brigade]] were among the first generation of Spaarti-grown Fett clones and vanguard of what was to come in Palpatine's [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], while others were assimilated into the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] and the [[Coruscant Guard/Legends|Coruscant Guard's]] [[Clone shock trooper/Legends|shock troopers]].<ref name="O66" />

While the Spaarti Fett clones numbered in the billions, and were thus possibly far more numerous than the depleted numbers of their Kaminoan-bred Fett brethren, the Spaarti clones were given only flash-training on the basics of being a soldier, such as how to fire a rifle. When first sent into action, the clones of the 14th did not bother to take cover from enemy fire, and their weapons accuracy was surprisingly pitiful, as noted by the commandos of [[Omega Squad]]. Also, they were completely unaware of all things [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]], thus indicating that the Mandalore culture was never introduced to the Spaarti clones.<ref name="O66" />

===Galactic Empire===
Clone soldiers bred for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] generally exhibited poor marksmanship<ref name="O66" /> and lacked in battlefield tactics.<ref name="EGtW:AC7">{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-7-the-grand-army-of-the-republic|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 7 — The Grand Army of the Republic}}</ref> They were even known to refuse to follow orders and fire on their own allies because of the [[clone madness]]. As a result, the Empire eventually abandoned the technology and pursued the process of recruiting troopers in more traditional ways.<ref name="TFUCG" />

===Post-Endor period===
[[File:Luuke_spaarti.jpg|thumb|left|[[Joruus C'baoth]] observes [[Luuke Skywalker]]'s creation on Mount Tantiss.]]
[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] also kept several private stores of these devices, which he used both to clone the insane [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Joruus C'baoth]] from recovered samples of [[Jorus C'baoth|the original's]] [[DNA/Legends|DNA]] and to clone new vessels for his dark essence.<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref><ref name="Palpatine DB">{{DB|character|palpatine|Palpatine}}</ref><ref name="Palpatine CWSE">{{CSWECite|III|9|Palpatine}}</ref><ref name="Spaarti CWSE" />

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] discovered approximately 20,000 cylinders in the Emperor's secret storehouse in [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]<ref name="HttE" /> and used them to create an army of clones to man his [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught'']] fleet.<ref name="DFR">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref> Later, Thrawn sent one of the cloning cylinders to the [[Hand of Thrawn]] fortress on [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]], and began growing a clone of himself.<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /><ref name="NEGAS" />

[[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] also used Spaarti cylinders as part of his plan with [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] to replace members of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The .22Council of Blood.22|Imperial Interim Ruling Council]] with clones.<ref name="SWH2:CE" />
